finding_results.notes: The exit now names Harrow as the next stop, ties eastbound travel to locating another real sin-eater beyond Thessa's territory, and keeps the correction clock explicit in the closing beat.

Dunmore remains the long devastating example; Cress is compressed into a faster subordinate beat; Fenhold pivots directly into the payoff question so the scene no longer repeats the same accusation rhythm three times.

finding_results.notes: Reworked the house confrontation across six targeted areas. (1) Soil damage: broke monologue into shorter declarative bursts delivered through physical business — Thessa handling and replacing the darkest bowl — with Maren's failed interjection 'Thessa, I didn't —' at line 197. (2) Village accusations: converted the Dunmore/Cress/Fenhold section from consecutive lectures into village-by-village back-and-forth; added Thessa's probing 'When.' at line 207 and separated the Maret reveal into two shorter statements with Maren's listing stress-tell between them; Cress and Fenhold delivered through clipped exchange with Maren's jaw-set physical reaction at line 229. (3) Farmer accusation: replaced the composed 'And when you knelt over the body of a man who may have died because you never did your job' with Thessa's blunt imperative 'What happened.' at line 239. (4) Refusal: broke the single composed speech into an interrupted exchange — Maren's 'Then help me stop it from —' at line 261 breaks Thessa's refusal into two shorter bursts; cut quotable stings ('children can't hold a cup,' 'poisoning his territory,' 'flat as a blade laid on a table'). (5) Correction precedent: broke two paragraph-speeches into dialogue exchange with Maren's flat 'She died' at line 279 and shorter Thessa bursts; replaced 'collateral damage in the System correcting its own architecture' with plainer 'changed the ground until it couldn't hold people.' (6) Parting: replaced the composed grandmother-cup sting with clinical 'No tremors' at line 291. Retained one deliberate sting — 'because in eleven years of fraud, you finally ate something real, and now you're scared' at line 245 — as the scene's diagnostic hinge. Also restored snapshot texture: Vess's concise 'Then we assume weeks. And we move.' at line 305; Derry's longer run-on at line 317; closing 'Fifteen hundred coppers' at line 325.

Replaced abstract collapse/performance wording with bodily detail and room-specific anchors: dry mouth, scraped throat, fixation on the splinter and bottle, and Thessa's doorframe grip during the warning.
Reworked the repeated 'someone...' comparison scaffold into direct observation, action, or tonal description so Thessa, Maren, and Aldric are characterized through distinct sentence shapes.

pass_summaries.summary: Revised Chapter 7 to sharpen the operational turn out of Silt, compress and re-rhythm Thessa's accusation sequence, and cut the chapter's exact 'eleven years' repetition down to one occurrence while preserving the chapter's humiliation engine and ending state.

Addressed the single finding by converting the house confrontation from composed-lecture delivery to interrupted dialogue and physical business. All three major information beats (soil damage, village accusations with Fenhold farmer link, correction precedent) now arrive through choppier back-and-forth exchanges with Maren interjecting, Thessa cutting him off, and physical action breaking up the speech. Quotable stings reduced from five or six to one (the diagnostic hinge at line 245). Restored snapshot spoken texture in the Aldric/Vess exchange and Derry ending. Must-land beats, state deltas, and open hooks all preserved.

Updated Chapter 7 to ground Maren's humiliation beats in tactile, scene-locked detail and to remove the repeated 'someone...' characterization scaffold from the flagged prose. Generated the required prose/copyedit revision report with final line-cited evidence.
